args:
set -eu
PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
if ! command -v serena >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Serena is not installed. Run the 'serena-install' skill to install the global serena CLI for this machine." >&2
  exit 1
fi
exec serena start-mcp-server --context claude-code --project-from-cwd
serena.note: Apple Silicon macOS stdio launcher. Finds global `serena` and starts Serena MCP. Use `serena-init` after startup to activate the project.
